frontmatter.title: Jazz - Music player (fork of the original)

node.html: Jazz is a powerful, elegant and free music player for Android following material UI guideliness from google .A clean music player with a customizable interface. Get it at Play Store

frontmatter.title: Smart Pad - Note pad clone in java

node.html: Smartpad or Jpad is a text editor based on java. I tried to clone notepad app on windows and added some extra featues.
A Module for Utilizing Pg-promise with NestJS

dagr2.py (deviantArt gallery ripper) is a deviantArt image downloader script written in Python. It can download every image (deviation) in a gallery, as well as every favorited deviation a deviant may have. Originally developed at http://lovecastle.org/dagr/ (now defunct), development now continues on Github
